modules.name: qstylizer.descriptor.stylerule
documentation: coding: utf-8

classes.name: qstylizer.descriptor.stylerule.StyleRuleDescriptor

methods.name: qstylizer.descriptor.stylerule.StyleRuleDescriptor.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the StyleRuleDescriptor instance.

```
param name

The attribute name of type string
```

methods.name: qstylizer.descriptor.stylerule.StyleRuleDescriptor.__get__
documentation:
Get the value from the StyleRule's ordered dict.

If value doesn't exist, create a new StyleRule instance and add it
to the StyleRule's ordered dict.

```
param instance

The StyleRule instance
```

methods.name: qstylizer.descriptor.stylerule.StyleRuleDescriptor.__set__
documentation:
Set the value in the StyleRule's ordered dict.

If the value is a StyleRule, simply add it to the ordered dict.
Otherwise create a new StyleRule instance, set its value
attribute to the value, and add it to the ordered dict.

```
param instance

The StyleRule instance

param value

The value to set in StyleRule instance
```
StyleRule descriptor.

classes.name: qstylizer.descriptor.stylerule.StyleRuleParent

methods.name: qstylizer.descriptor.stylerule.StyleRuleParent.get_attributes
documentation:
Get all of the settable attributes of the StyleRule.

Loop through all base classes to gather all known attributes.
Returns a dictionary with the attribute name as the key and descriptor
as the value.

methods.name: qstylizer.descriptor.stylerule.StyleRuleParent.get_attr_options
documentation:
Get all of the attribute names of the StyleRule.

Returns a set of all possible dashcase attribute names.

StyleRule descriptor.

Contains functions for getting all known attributes of the StyleRule.

classes.name: qstylizer.descriptor.prop.PropDescriptor

classes.name: qstylizer.descriptor.prop.PropParent
documentation:
Property setter.

Contains descriptors for all known properties.

modules.name: qstylizer.style
documentation: coding: utf-8

functions.name: qstylizer.style.rule_class
documentation:
Determine StyleRule subclass from string name.

```
param name

name of type string
```

classes.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.split_selector
documentation:
Split the selector based on the \_split_regex.

Return a list of each component.
Example:

```
name = "QObject::subcontrol:pseudostate"
return value = ["QObject", "::subcontrol", ":pseudostate"]
```

```
param name

String name
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the StyleRule dictionary.

:::{note}
All public variables will be put into ordered dictionary.
:::

```
param name

The name of the StyleRule

param value

The property value

param parent

The parent StyleRule
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule._sanitize_key
documentation:
Strip the key of colons and replace underscores with dashes.

```
param key

A string variable
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule._sanitize_value
documentation:
Strip the value of any semi-colons.

```
param value

A value of any type
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.find_or_create_child_rule
documentation:
Find or create a child rule from a string key.

If the key rule already exists, return the rule.
If there is a comma in requested key, return a StyleRuleList object.
Otherwise create rules from the style rule names in the key and return
the top level rule or property.

```
param name

The dictionary key
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.find_child_rule
documentation:
Find rule from key.

Return the sanitized key's hash value in the ordered dict.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.create_child_rule_list
documentation:
Create a StyleRuleList object and add it to ordered dict.

```
param name

String name
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.create_child_rules
documentation:
Create child rules from selector string.

Split the selector into individual components based on the \_split_regex
and recursively build the StyleRule hierarchy looping through
the components.

If selector is "QClass::subcontrol:pseudostate",
curr_name is "QClass" and remaining is "::subcontrol:pseudostate"

```
param name

String to split
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.create_child_rule
documentation:
Create child rule from name.

Determine subclass from name, create an instance of the subclass,
then add it to ordered dict.

```
param name

String name
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.set_child_rule
documentation: Set rule in ordered dictionary.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule._add_child_rule
documentation:
Add a rule to the \_child_rules dictionary.

```
param rule

A StyleRule object.
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.selector
documentation:
Get the selector.

Example:

```
Object::subcontrol:pseudostate
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.name
documentation:
Return the name of the StyleRule (eg. "QCheckBox").

Strip off the scope operator if it exists in name.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.scope_operator
documentation:
Get the scope operator.

The scope operator is the "::" or ":" that is printed in front
of the name of the StyleRule in the selector.

Subclasses are expected to define the scope operator or else it will
try to guess it based on its position in the hierarchy.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.is_leaf
documentation:
Determine if StyleRule is a leaf.

StyleRule is a leaf its child rules dictionary contains only PropRules.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.is_top_level
documentation:
Determine if StyleRule is top level.

StyleRule is top level if its parent is of the StyleSheet class.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule._to_string_recursive
documentation:
Convert all child rules into a single stirng in css format.

Loop through all of the rules and generate a stylesheet string.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule._to_string
documentation:
Convert to a single string in css format.

```
param recursive

Output all of the sub-style rules.
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.toString
documentation:
Convert to a single string in css format.

Use camelcase for function name to match PyQt/PySide.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule._set_values
documentation: Set property values in the style rule.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.setValues
documentation:
Set property values in the style rule.

Use camelcase for function name to match PyQt/PySide.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule._set_value
documentation: Set property value.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.setValue
documentation:
Set property value.

Use camelcase for function name to match PyQt/PySide.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.__getitem__
documentation:
Override the retrieving of a value from dictionary.

Find or create rule in the key's hash location.

```
param key

The dictionary key
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.__delattr__
documentation:
Override the deletion of an attribute.

If attribute starts with an underscore, delete the attribute from
the object's \_\_dict\_\_ otherwise delete it from the ordered dict.

```
param name

String name of attribute to delete
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.__setattr__
documentation:
Override the setting of an attribute.

If name is in the pre-defined attributes, call the attribute's
descriptor's \_\_set\_\_ function. Otherwise, add it to ordered dict as-is.

```
param name

The attribute name

param val

The value to set
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.__setitem__
documentation:
Override the setting of an attribute in ordered dict.

If key is in pre-defined attributes, call attribute's descriptor's
\_\_set\_\_ function. Otherwise add the value to ordered dict as-is.

```
param key

The hash key of the ordered dict

param value

The value to map to hash key
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.__deepcopy__
documentation:
Override deepcopy.

Make a deepcopy of all member attributes as well as all rule rules
in ordered dictionary.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.__repr__
documentation: Set the representation to look like xml syntax.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRule.__str__
documentation: Call toString if StyleRule is cast to string.

classes.name: qstylizer.style.StyleSheet

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleSheet.is_global_scope
documentation:
Determine if stylesheet is global scope.

A StyleSheet is global scope if it has no rules.
Resulting string should contain no brackets.

```
background-color: red;
border: none;
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleSheet._to_string_recursive
documentation:
Convert all child rules into a single stirng in css format.

Loop through all of the rules and generate a stylesheet string.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleSheet._to_string
documentation:
Return the selector and properties as a single string.

```
param recursive

Loop through all rules to generate a stylesheet.
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleSheet.name
documentation: Return the name of the StyleSheet.

The StyleSheet definition.

Contains descriptors for all class and property options.

classes.name: qstylizer.style.ClassRule
documentation:
The ClassRule definition.

Example class rule name: "QCheckBox".
Contains descriptors for all subcontrols and pseudostates.

classes.name: qstylizer.style.ObjectRule
documentation:
The ObjectRule definition.

Example object rule name: "#objectName".
Inherits from ClassRule. Only difference is "#" is the scope operator.

classes.name: qstylizer.style.ChildClassRule
documentation:
The ChildClassRule definition.

Example object rule name: " QFrame".
Inherits from ClassRule.

```
QWidget QFrame {
    property: value
}
```

classes.name: qstylizer.style.ObjectPropRule
documentation:
The ObjectPropRule definition.

Example object property rule name: "[echoMode="2"]".

classes.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRuleList

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRuleList._sanitize_key
documentation: Strip the key of newlines only.

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRuleList._create_child_rules_in_parent
documentation:
Find or create value in parent StyleRule

Will loop through all components in name separated by a comma and set the
property in each of the rules in the parent StyleRule.

```
param name

The attribute name

param val

The value
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRuleList.__setattr__
documentation:
Override the setting of an attribute.

```
param name

The attribute name

param val

The value to set
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRuleList.__setitem__
documentation:
Override the setting of a value in ordered dict.

```
param key

The hash key of the ordered dict

param value

The value to map to hash key
```

methods.name: qstylizer.style.StyleRuleList.name
documentation: Return the name with no spaces.

The StyleRuleList definition.

Example rule list name: "QCheckBox, QComboBox".

classes.name: qstylizer.style.SubControlRule
documentation:
The SubControlRule definition.

Example subcontrol name: "::indicator".

classes.name: qstylizer.style.PseudoStateRule
documentation:
The PseudoStateRule definition.

Example pseudostate name: ":hover".

classes.name: qstylizer.style.PseudoPropRule
qstylizer.style.PropRule
documentation:
The PropRule definition.

Example prop rule name: "background-color".
